home.guestAutoRedirect: A yoo gbe lọ si yara ifọrọranṣẹ laifọwọyi nigbati alejo ba wọle.

chat.noVoice: Ko si ohun ti a ri
chat.lastSeenUnknown: Ko si alaye asopọ to kẹhin
chat.pinDone: Yara ifọrọranṣẹ ti wa ni titi
chat.reconnectTap: Asopọ ti ge. Tẹ lati tun sopọ
chat.retranslateSoon: Beere fun itumọ lẹẹkansi n bọ
chat.deleteQuestion: Ṣe o fẹ pa ifiranṣẹ naa?
chat.signupQuestion: Ṣe o fẹ forukọsilẹ si MONO?
chat.benefitFriends: ✅ O le fi awọn ọrẹ kun
chat.benefitReuse: ✅ O le tun lo itumọ nigbakugba
chat.shareText: Darapọ mọ ifọrọranṣẹ itumọ ni akoko gidi lori MONO
chat.retryLater: Jọwọ gbiyanju lẹẹkansi ni igba diẹ.

contacts.inviteFromContactsDesc: Wa awọn olumulo MONO ninu awọn olubasọrọ foonu rẹ, ki o si fi ọna asopọ pipe ranṣẹ si awọn ti ko forukọsilẹ.
contacts.idMin2: Jọwọ tẹ ID MONO ti o kere ju awọn lẹta meji.

settings.notifRequestCancelled: Beere fun igbanilaaye iwifunni ti fagile.
settings.dataClearConfirm:
Ṣe o fẹ pa gbogbo data agbegbe rẹ?
(Eto, itan ifọrọranṣẹ, ati bẹbẹ lọ yoo tunṣe)
settings.monoIdTaken: ID MONO ti wa ni lilo tẹlẹ.
settings.deleteAccountConfirm:
Ṣe o da ọ loju pe o fẹ pa iroyin rẹ?
Gbogbo data yoo paarẹ patapata ati pe ko le tunṣe.
settings.deleteAccountFinal: Ijerisi ikẹhin: Ṣe o da ọ loju pe o fẹ pa iroyin rẹ?

guestJoin.subtitle: AI ifọrọranṣẹ itumọ akoko gidi
guestJoin.selectLanguage: Jọwọ yan ede ti o fẹ lo
guestJoin.noInstall: Itumọ yoo bẹrẹ laisi fifi sori ẹrọ
guestJoin.linkInfo: A yoo gbe lọ si iboju itumọ lẹsẹkẹsẹ nigbati o wọle nipasẹ ọna asopọ

languageSelector.frequent: Awọn ede ti a maa n lo

installBanner.desc: O le lo ni irọrun diẹ sii nipa fifi kun si iboju ile.

inAppBlocker.title: Jọwọ ṣii ninu aṣawakiri ita
inAppBlocker.body1: Asopọ ipe/itumọ maa n ge ni aṣawakiri yii.
inAppBlocker.body2: Tẹ bọtini ni isalẹ lati ṣii lẹẹkansi ni Safari tabi Chrome.
inAppBlocker.hint: Ni apa ọtun oke ti Katọk ··· → Ṣii ninu aṣawakiri miiran tun ṣeeṣe

global.title: Agbaye
global.timeout: Idaduro esi: Jọwọ ṣayẹwo ipo nẹtiwọọki ki o gbiyanju lẹẹkansi.
global.joining: N beere lati wọle si ikanni agbaye...
global.joinedMoving: Wọle si ikanni pari. N gbe...
global.createSoon: UI fun ṣiṣe yara yoo sopọ ni igbesẹ atẹle.

csChat.title: Oluranlọwọ MONO
csChat.usage: Mo fẹ mọ bi mo ṣe le lo
csChat.pricing: Mo fẹ mọ nipa awọn idiyele
csChat.fallback: A yoo gbe ibeere yii si oludari. Jọwọ kan si wa nipasẹ imeeli (support@lingora.chat) lati gba iranlọwọ ni kiakia.

onboarding.slide1Title: O le ba sọrọ paapaa pẹlu awọn ede oriṣiriṣi
onboarding.slide1Body: Sọrọ ni irọrun pẹlu itumọ akoko gidi.
onboarding.slide2Title: Fi awọn ọrẹ kun ki o bẹrẹ ifọrọranṣẹ
onboarding.slide2Body: O le wa awọn ọrẹ ni kiakia pẹlu wiwa ID MONO.
onboarding.slide3Title: Itumọ lẹsẹkẹsẹ pẹlu koodu QR kan
onboarding.slide3Body: Ṣii QR ninu taabu itumọ ki o bẹrẹ ifọrọranṣẹ lẹsẹkẹsẹ.

login.subtitle: AI ifọrọranṣẹ itumọ akoko gidi
login.termsAgree: Nipa wọle, o gba awọn ofin lilo ati eto imulo asiri wa.
login.termsAgreePatientJoin: Nipa lilo iṣẹ itumọ ni {{hospitalName}}, o fọwọsi si <1>Awọn ofin iṣẹ</1> ati <2>Ilana aṣiri</2>.
login.termsAgreePatientJoinFallback: Nipa lilo iṣẹ itumọ, o fọwọsi si <1>Awọn ofin iṣẹ</1> ati <2>Ilana aṣiri</2>.
login.termsAgreeRegister: Nipa iforukọsilẹ, o fara si awọn ofin iṣẹ ati Ilana Asiri.
